data.title: Gate Wallet BountyDrop launches Caldera and Tagger airdrop activities
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate Wallet BountyDrop has launched Caldera and Tagger airdrop activities. Users can enter the BountyDrop section through the Gate Wallet App "Discover" page to participate in the task. Completing the task will give you a chance to win rewards.
BountyDrop is an exclusive coin-earning activity area in the Gate Wallet "Discover" page. Users can have the opportunity to win rewards or participate in the lottery to get airdrop tokens by completing simple tasks.
In addition, the Gate Wallet invitation rebate function has been launched. Old users can go to the invitation page to receive a limited-time exclusive benefit of 20% handling fee rebate. Invite friends to bind and you can also get 30% of the friend's transaction fee as a rebate, and friends can receive 20% of their own transaction fee rebate.
Gate Wallet connects 100+ public chains, millions of assets and tens of thousands of DApps in one stop, opening a professional-level Web3 experience and providing the best solution for every Web3 need.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List Giants Protocol (G)
data.description: Key Points:Binance Alpha will launch trading for Giants Protocol (G) on July 18, 2025, at 13:00 (UTC).Eligible users can claim airdrops using Alpha Points after trading opens.Binance Alpha has announced it will list Giants Protocol (G) on July 18, 2025. According to the official statement, users with at least 165 Binance Alpha points will be able to claim an airdrop of 88,000 G tokens on a first-come, first-served basis, until the airdrop pool is fully distributed or the airdrop event expires.Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points and users must confirm their claims on the Alpha Events page within 24 hours; otherwise, it will be deemed that users have given up claiming the airdrop.

data.title: Binance: Users holding at least 165 Binance Alpha Points can claim 88,000 G tokens for short-selling
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance will start trading Giants Protocol (G) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on July 18, 2025. Users who hold at least 165 Binance Alpha points can apply for 88,000 G tokens airdrop. First come, first served, until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends.
Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: Bitcoin's Bullish Momentum Fueled by Golden Cross Signals
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Bitcoin's recent golden cross on the daily chart is generating optimism among traders, as it historically signals significant price increases. The golden cross, which occurs when the 50-day simple moving average (SMA) surpasses the 200-day SMA, has been associated with substantial gains, sometimes exceeding 2,000%. This pattern has been observed in past bull markets, notably in 2017 and 2020, where Bitcoin experienced massive surges. The latest golden cross was confirmed in late May, and since then, Bitcoin has shown upward movement, although the gains have been relatively modest at 12% so far. Trader Merlijn highlighted this development on X, emphasizing the potential for Bitcoin to reach $155,000 in the coming months.

Bitcoin's price action is currently consolidating below $120,000, but market sentiment remains positive, with expectations of further price discovery. Analysts suggest that a daily close above the $120,000 resistance level, followed by a retest, could confirm a breakout to new highs. The next target for Bitcoin is projected to be around $135,000, as the cryptocurrency continues to move independently of broader macroeconomic concerns. This bullish outlook is supported by the first-ever weekly golden cross event at the start of 2024, which coincided with the beginning of the current bull market's upward trajectory. As Bitcoin consolidates, some capital is being redirected into altcoins, according to analyst Rekt Capital. Despite the optimism, it is important to note that investment in cryptocurrencies carries risks, and individuals should conduct thorough research before making any trading decisions.

data.title: Binance to Suspend Kadena Network Transactions for Upgrade
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, starting at approximately 2025-07-22 23:00 (UTC), the platform will temporarily suspend deposits and withdrawals of tokens on the Kadena (KDA) network. This suspension is to facilitate a network upgrade and hard fork scheduled for 2025-07-23 00:00 (UTC). The upgrade aims to enhance the user experience by ensuring the network's stability and performance.

The trading of tokens on the Kadena network will remain unaffected during this period. Binance assures users that it will manage all technical requirements related to the upgrade, minimizing any potential disruptions. Once the network is confirmed to be stable post-upgrade, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened. Binance has stated that no further announcements will be made regarding the reopening of these services. Users are encouraged to stay informed through the project's official channels for any additional updates.
